items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.7 mph at a 9.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 0, TB 4. Seth Lugo led the night, working 6.0 innings with 3 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 0 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.7 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Rays Recap
